# teams config set

Set a configuration value

## Usage

```
teams config set <key> [value] [options]
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `key` | Config key to set | Yes |
| `value` | Value to set. Omit to pick interactively. | No |

## Options

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--json` | [OPTIONAL] Output as JSON |
<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
